reasoning: Lactate clearance remains your top limiter. Your recent ride maintained a 69% FTP, indicating endurance but lacking high-intensity adaptations. Our goal is to raise your capacity for sustained efforts simulating the crucial Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 5-min at 242-256W followed by 5-min at 201-218W, simulating elevation profiles like the Alpine Loop

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
